title: Argus Partners announces Partner Promotions
description: Argus Partners has announced Partner designations and promotions at the Firm: Soorjya Ganguli has been designated as Senior Partner; Jitendra Soni has been elevated to the firm’s Equity Partnership; and Jaidrath Zaveri has been promoted to Salaried Partner.Ganguli is a key member of the Firm’s Executive Committee, playing a central role in shaping its strategic direction, overseeing management decisions, driving growth and expansion initiatives, and supporting the Firm’s long-term business and c
